criteria_results.criterion: BUG-023: Audit every DialogContent in canvas-view.tsx render tree — ensure each has a DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper). Zero DialogTitle console.error warnings.
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx line 20: `import * as DialogPrimitive from '@radix-ui/react-dialog'`. Line 367: `<DialogPrimitive.Title className='...'>Templates</DialogPrimitive.Title>` — uses the actual Radix primitive directly, which satisfies Radix's internal context-based a11y check. Comment at lines 27-30 documents root cause (custom ui/dialog.tsx DialogTitle wraps plain <h2>, invisible to Radix). Fix scoped to the Templates dialog (the only DialogContent in canvas-view.tsx). section-detail-panel.tsx retains same root-cause issue but is marked read-only for this task — console.error will still fire from the Save as Template dialog until that file is fixed.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-036: Template browser dialog shows STARTER_TEMPLATES cards unconditionally — even when templateError is set. Error message at top; DB template cards hidden on error; starters always visible.
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx lines 376-426: loading branch renders 4 skeleton placeholders; non-loading branch is a single grid containing: (a) error message only if templateError (line 379-381), (b) DB templates only if !templateError (lines 387-408), (c) STARTER_TEMPLATES.map unconditionally (lines 409-425). Starters are outside the templateError guard, satisfying the requirement. The previous structure that hid starters on error has been removed.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-030: All icon-only buttons on canvas toolbar and tab-bar have aria-label attributes. Templates button and Coloring button already have aria-label; find any remaining without.
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx line 334: `aria-label='Browse templates'` on Templates button; line 349: `aria-label='Toggle coloring rules'` on Color button; line 394: `aria-label='Delete template'` on each per-template delete button. Builder confirmed tab-bar.tsx close-tab and add-tab buttons already had aria-labels — no changes needed. BUILD_RESULT_1 staged files list confirms only canvas-view.tsx was modified.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-020: When Load More clicked, 2-3 skeleton row placeholders appear below existing entries while loading; match real entry layout; disappear when data arrives; no layout shift.
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx lines 183-191: `{loading && [0, 1, 2].map(i => <div key={'skeleton-'+i} className='rounded-[var(--radius-sm)] p-3 bg-[var(--bg-surface-active)] border border-[var(--border-subtle)]'>...)}` — 3 skeleton rows rendered only when `loading=true`. Each row contains: `h-3 w-3/4 animate-pulse bg-[var(--bg-surface-secondary)] rounded-[var(--radius-md)]` (action line) and `h-2.5 w-2/5 animate-pulse bg-[var(--bg-surface-secondary)] rounded-[var(--radius-md)]` (timestamp line). Same container class as real entries ensures no layout shift. Rows placed after `filtered.map(...)` so they append below existing content. `setLoading(false)` in finally block (line 90) removes skeletons when request completes.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-020: Load More button text simplified (no conditional 'Loading...' text) since skeletons serve as loading indicator.
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx line 202: button text is static 'Load More'. No conditional rendering based on loading state for the button label. The disabled={loading} prop prevents double-clicks while skeleton rows are visible.

quality_gate.notes: Browser testing performed on production (stride-five-sigma.vercel.app) which runs an older branch (pre-iteration-101 features). Local dev server (localhost:3000) serves a different application. Static code analysis of changed files was the primary verification method. Production canvas page loaded without console errors post-injection. Production page has 4 pre-existing unlabeled buttons (icon buttons in older code before IMP-030 fixes were applied) — these are pre-existing issues not caused by iteration 102.

bugs_found.description: Save as Template dialog in section-detail-panel.tsx uses the custom ui/dialog.tsx DialogTitle wrapper (plain <h2>) instead of DialogPrimitive.Title. Radix's a11y check cannot detect it, causing a console.error on dialog open. This is the same root cause fixed in canvas-view.tsx by this iteration, but section-detail-panel.tsx is a read-only file for this task.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to canvas view. 2. Click on a section. 3. In the section detail panel, click 'Save as Template'. 4. Check browser console for DialogTitle warning.

improvements_found.observation: The Load More button is disabled while loading but provides no visible affordance beyond opacity-50 that it is in a loading state. Users who miss the skeleton rows may think the button is simply broken.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Consider adding a subtle spinner icon inside the Load More button when loading=true as a secondary signal alongside the skeleton rows.

improvements_found.observation: Production canvas page has 4 icon-only buttons without aria-labels visible in pre-iteration-102 code (two close-tab and two inline action buttons). These will be resolved once iteration 102 is deployed, but may indicate additional buttons in other code paths that need audit.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Run a full aria-label audit across all icon-only buttons as part of the FEAT-053 testing gate.
